content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Winter is Over
description: Winter is Over is a unique Eridian relic from the Fight for Sanctuary DLC in Borderlands 2. It can be obtained from Ghost, a named skag found in a small cave near the entrance to The Burrows.
notes: This relic may appear in blue or purple. Its name is a nod to the phrase "Winter is Coming".

special.description: Boosts Incendiary damage dealt by up to 42%.
